title: The Girl Next Door
author: Jodie Knaan

beats.name: beat_1
beats.desc: The man begins secretly following a woman.

beats.name: beat_2
beats.desc: He tries to control his emotions but finds himself captivated.

beats.name: beat_3
beats.desc: The woman's daily routine becomes his focus.

beats.name: beat_6
beats.desc: He decides to continue his surveillance.

summary: A man secretly observes a woman, gradually uncovering her secrets while his own obsession deepens.
